task_completion.description: Open the scconfig application and navigate to the Bindings section.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'scconfig' GUI window is open and the 'Bindings' tab/section is active, displaying the network and station tree.

task_completion.description: Configure the GE.GSI station with scautopick and scamp module bindings.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the scconfig Bindings tree, under the GE network, the GSI station shows 'scautopick' and 'scamp' added to its bindings (typically indicated by checkmarks, listed modules, or the 'default' profile attached to these modules).

task_completion.description: Configure the GE.BKB station with scautopick and scamp module bindings.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the scconfig Bindings tree, under the GE network, the BKB station shows 'scautopick' and 'scamp' added to its bindings.

task_completion.description: Configure the GE.SANI station with scautopick and scamp module bindings.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the scconfig Bindings tree, under the GE network, the SANI station shows 'scautopick' and 'scamp' added to its bindings.

task_completion.description: Save the configuration to write the changes to the station key files.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Visual evidence of saving the configuration in scconfig (e.g., clicking 'Save', 'Update Configuration', or a save confirmation dialog) OR a terminal window showing the contents of the key files in /home/ga/seiscomp/etc/key/ containing the new scautopick and scamp bindings.

integrity.description: Verify that the agent used the scconfig GUI to perform the configuration rather than exclusively using terminal commands to bypass the UI.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots must show interaction with the scconfig graphical interface (adding profiles, checking boxes) to configure the bindings.

integrity.description: Verify that the actual scconfig application is being used.
integrity.visual_evidence: The application window matches the standard SeisComP scconfig interface with its characteristic layout (tabs for System, Bindings, Modules, etc.), not a generic text editor.

integrity.description: Verify that the agent did not modify unrelated stations or modules.
integrity.visual_evidence: Only the GSI, BKB, and SANI stations under the GE network should show new bindings for scautopick and scamp. No other stations should be modified.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The task requires configuring SeisComP module bindings for three specific stations: GE.GSI, GE.BKB, and GE.SANI. The required modules to bind are 'scautopick' and 'scamp' using the default profile. The configuration must be performed using the 'scconfig' GUI application. Successfully saving this configuration in scconfig will automatically update the station key files located in the /home/ga/seiscomp/etc/key/ directory.
